Buy Me A Coffee
Site Map - All Tools, Guides & Resources
Initializing, please wait a moment

Site Map

Looking for the right tool but cannot recall the name? Skim the list below. Every tool runs in your browser - no signup, no upload to a server - and every link points to the canonical page (no redirects to slow you down).

Tools sit under eight task-based categories. Long-form guides - decision walkthroughs, step-by-step recipes, and trade-off explainers - sit below them, grouped by the kind of problem they solve. If a category looks empty for a tool you remember using, the link likely moved into the new category-tools hub; the URL still works.

Browse guides in your language: English · Portuguese (XML) · Spanish (XML) · Vietnamese (XML) · Indonesian (XML) · German (XML)

Jump to

  • Tools by category (103)
  • Guides by topic (1485)
  • Site resources

Tools by category

103 tools across eight task categories. Tap a category heading to jump to its hub - the hub page explains when to pick each tool in that group and which inputs each one expects.

ZIP and archive tools

Browser-based compression and password workflows for ZIP archives. Hub: ZIP Tools Online - Compress, Unzip, Remove Password.

  • Compress Folders & Files to ZIP - Free Online File Compressor - Compress folders and files into a ZIP archive online.
  • Extract & Unzip Files Online - Decompress ZIP - Extract files from a ZIP online - open archives, browse contents, and download individual files in your browser.
  • Remove Zip Password - Remove ZIP passwords online with the correct password to unlock your archive.

Image editing tools

Compress, resize, crop, and edit images directly in the browser. Hub: Image Editing Tools Online (Resize, Crop, Compress).

  • File Compressor - Single Image (JPG, PNG) - Free online image compressor - drop a JPG, PNG, or WebP, preview the before/after, and download a smaller file.
  • Resize Image Online - JPG, PNG & WebP Image Resizer - Resize image online - set exact pixels or a percentage, keep aspect ratio, and export JPG, PNG, or WebP.
  • Crop & Rotate Image Online - Free Image Cropper Tool - Crop image online to a free-form area or a preset ratio (1:1, 16:9, 4:5); rotate in 90° steps or at a free angle.
  • Photo Editor Online - Filters, Layers & Text, Free - Photo editor online - filters, color & brightness tuning, multi-layer overlays, text, and borders at up to 8K resolution.
  • GIF Maker Online - Build GIFs from Video or Images - GIF maker online - create an animated GIF from a video clip or a sequence of still images.
  • Image Optimizer Online - PageSpeed Insights Ready - Image optimizer online - compress JPG, PNG, and WebP for PageSpeed Insights.
  • JPEG Compression Level Checker - Inspect JPG Quality - JPEG compression level checker - inspect the quality value a JPG was saved with, estimate headroom for further compression, and compare before and after.
  • ImageMagick Online - Run Commands in Your Browser - ImageMagick online - run resize, convert, composite, and effect commands directly in your browser.
  • Steganography - Hide Text in a PNG Image - Steganography - Hide a secret text message inside an ordinary PNG image - the picture looks identical to the eye but carries your hidden note in its pixels.
  • AI Background Remover - Free Online - AI Background Remover - Remove the background from an image in your browser - your image never leaves your device.

Image conversion tools

Convert between image formats (HEIC, JPG, PNG, SVG, Base64) in the browser. Hub: Image Converter Tools Online (HEIC, JPG, PNG, SVG).

  • HEIC to JPG, Auto EXIF & Rotate - Convert HEIC to JPG online - also PNG, WebP, or a combined PDF.
  • SVG to PNG Converter Online - Export PNG or WebP Free - SVG to PNG converter online - export a crisp PNG, WebP, or JPG from any vector file.
  • PNG to SVG Converter - Vectorize PNG or JPG Online - PNG to SVG converter online - trace a PNG or JPG into a scalable vector graphic via interpolation.
  • Image to Base64 Online - Encode PNG or JPG to Base64 - Image to Base64 online - encode a PNG, JPG, or WebP into a Base64 data URI for CSS backgrounds, JSON payloads, or email embeds.
  • Base64 to Image Converter Online - Decode to PNG/JPG - Base64 to image online - paste a data URI or raw Base64 string, click Convert, and your browser renders the decoded picture as a preview.
  • Split GIF Into Frames - Free GIF Frame Extractor (PNG/JPG) - Extract every frame from an animated GIF and save each as PNG or JPG.
  • Free Audio Converter - MP3, WAV, AAC, OGG, FLAC in Your Browser - Free audio converter - turn MP3, WAV, AAC, OGG, FLAC, or M4A files, or a video's audio track, into an MP3 at your chosen bitrate in the browser.

PDF tools

Compose, split, merge, protect, and convert PDFs fully in the browser. Hub: PDF Tools Online (Create, Convert, Split, Secure).

  • Compose PDF Online with Headings, Lists, Tables, and Page Breaks - Create PDFs online with a simple PDF editor.
  • Split PDF by Range Online - Extract Page Ranges Free - Split PDF by range online - extract pages 3-7 (or any range) from a PDF into a new file.
  • Split PDF to Single Pages - One File per Page Online - Split PDF to individual pages online - one PDF file per source page, numbered in order.
  • Merge PDF Files Online - Join Multiple PDFs to One - Merge PDF online - combine multiple PDF files into one, preserving the upload order.
  • Encrypt, Protect PDF By Password - Protect your confidential PDFs from unauthorized access with this PDF encryption tool.
  • Remove PDF Password Online - Free - Easily remove password protection from your PDF files with an efficient and free online tool.
  • PDF Preflight Validator - PDF/A-1B & PDF/A-1A Check - PDF preflight online - validate a PDF for PDF/A-1B or PDF/A-1A archival compliance and list structural issues before printing.
  • Flatten PDF Online - Bake Layers, Forms & Annotations - Flatten PDF online - bake form fields, annotations, and layered content into the page itself.
  • PDF to Text Converter (Extract Text) - Extract text from PDF online for copying and editing.
  • PDF to Images Online - Export PNG or JPG Per Page - PDF to images online - export every PDF page (or a selected range) as PNG or JPG.
  • Convert PDF to HTML Online - Preserve Page Structure - PDF to HTML converter online - turn a PDF into standards-compliant HTML that preserves headings, lists, tables, and images.
  • Images to PDF Online - JPG, PNG to Multi-Page PDF - Images to PDF online - combine JPG, PNG, or WebP into a multi-page PDF.
  • PDF Form Filler Online - Fill In Existing Form Fields - Fill in an existing PDF's form fields online, right in your browser.

Developer tools

Minifiers, beautifiers, diff, and generators used in day-to-day web development. Hub: Developer Tools Online (JSON, Minify, Diff, MD5).

  • JSON Parser & Formatter (Tree View) - Paste JSON to validate, format, and view it in a tree.
  • CSS Minifier Online - Free, Paste & Minify Instantly - Minify CSS online for faster page loads.
  • CSS Unminifier Online - Beautify Minified CSS Free - CSS unminifier online - beautify minified CSS with proper indentation, line breaks, and readable formatting.
  • JavaScript Minifier Online - Free, Paste & Minify JS - JavaScript minifier online free - paste your JS, click Minify, and copy the compressed code.
  • JavaScript Unminifier - Beautify Minified JS Online - JavaScript unminifier online - reformat minified JS with indentation and line breaks for stack-trace debugging.
  • Text Diff Checker Online - Compare Text Side-by-Side - Text diff online - compare two text blocks and highlight added, removed, and changed characters, words, or lines.
  • MD5 Hash Generator (Text to MD5, Free) - Free online MD5 hash generator and MD5-to-text reverse lookup.
  • CSS Gradient Generator - Build & Copy Gradient Code - CSS gradient generator - build animated linear gradients with live preview; copy ready-to-paste CSS with vendor-prefix fallbacks for every browser.
  • Text to HTML Editor Online - Live WYSIWYG Preview - Text to HTML editor online - write in a WYSIWYG view and watch the generated HTML update live, with JavaScript support.
  • Online Regex Tester - Match, Highlight and Debug Patterns - Regex Tester Online - Test a regular expression against your own sample text and watch every match highlight as you type.
  • Color Picker - Free Online, No Sign-Up - Pick a color and read its HEX, RGB, and HSL values, with complementary, analogous, and shade palettes and one-click copy.
  • Data Visualizer - Free Online, No Sign-Up - Paste CSV, JSON, or Label, Value rows and draw them as bar, line, pie, and more chart types - all in your browser.
  • Online Code Editor - In Your Browser, No Upload - A free in-browser code editor powered by the Monaco engine behind VS Code.
  • Code Beautifier - Format JavaScript, CSS & HTML Online - Beautify JavaScript, CSS, HTML, and JSON in your browser.
  • Word Counter - Count Words, Characters & Reading Time - Count words, characters, sentences, lines, and estimated reading time live as you type or paste text - free, in your browser, no upload.
  • Sort Text Lines Online - Alphabetize a List A-Z or Z-A - Free online tool to sort text lines alphabetically, A-Z or Z-A, right in your browser.
  • Remove Duplicate Lines Online - Keep the First, Drop the Repeats - Free online tool to remove duplicate lines from a pasted list, right in your browser.
  • Reverse Text Online - Flip a String Character by Character - Free online tool to reverse a block of text character by character, right in your browser.
  • Text Repeater - Repeat Text Online, Free - Free online text repeater.
  • Base64 Encoder and Decoder - Text to Base64 in Your Browser - Encode text to Base64 or decode a Base64 string back to text, right in your browser - no upload and no account.
  • URL Decoder Online - Free Tool - URL Decoder - Free Online Tool.

Video tools

Browser-based video conversion and remixing via WebAssembly-powered FFmpeg. Hub: Video Tools Online (Convert, Trim, Resize, FFmpeg).

  • Online Video Converter with Trim - MP4, MOV, MP3 - Upload a video, trim with start/duration sliders, convert to MP4, WebM, MOV, MP3, or WAV.

  • Online Video Trimmer - Free Online - Online Video Trimmer - Trim an MP4, MOV, or WebM video to the exact time range you need, right in your browser.
  • Video to GIF Converter - Free Online - Video to GIF Converter - Convert a VIDEO input into a GIF output - one step, in the browser.

Device test tools

Quick browser-only checks for microphone, camera, display, and keyboard. Hub: Device Test Tools Online (Camera, Mic, Keyboard, LCD).

  • Microphone Test Online - Live Spectrum Meter & Permission Check - Free microphone test online: live spectrum meter, mic permission check, and optional speaker loopback in your browser.
  • Camera Test Online - Live Preview, Resolution & Capture - Free camera test online: live preview, resolution readout, switch front and back camera, capture and download a JPEG photo - all in your browser.
  • LCD Screen Test - Full-Screen Color Cycle - Test your LCD screen for dead pixels, stuck pixels, and backlight bleed.
  • Keyboard Test Online (Key Checker) - Keyboard test online - press each key to highlight it, spot non-working keys, and verify Num Lock, shift, and special keys in-browser, no install.
  • Screen Recorder - Record Screen, Camera or Mic in Browser - Record your screen, camera, or microphone in the browser, blur faces while recording, and download the clip as WebM or convert it to MP4 - no upload.
  • GPU Test - WebGL Benchmark & Info - Free Online - GPU Test - WebGL Benchmark & Info - See what your browser's graphics stack can do - WebGL 1 and 2 availability, the renderer name your browser reports, tex...

Utility tools

Timestamps, QR codes, and small utilities that do not fit the other categories. Hub: Utility Tools Online (Timestamps, QR Codes, Calculators).

  • File Compressor Online: Pick the Right Tool by File Type - Free file compressor online: ZIP a folder, compress JPG/PNG photos, convert HEIC to JPG, or merge PDFs - the right tool for each input, in your browser.
  • Milliseconds to Date Converter - Epoch to Readable Time - Convert any Unix millisecond timestamp to a readable date - paste 1713538800000, get UTC + local time instantly.
  • Current Time in Milliseconds - Live Epoch Timestamp - Get current time in milliseconds online - live Unix epoch reading updated every second.
  • QR Code Generator Online - Free URL, Text, Wi-Fi QRs - QR code generator online - create a scannable QR for a URL, short text, contact vCard, or Wi-Fi credential.

Guides by topic

1485 guides written to answer the question behind the search. Most are 3-7 minute reads that pick the right tool, show the steps, and call out the trade-offs (when ZIP saves space, when HEIC is fine to keep, when MD5 is the wrong hash). For a one-page browse, see All Guides.

ZIP and file compression (227)

  • ZIP-Entsperrer online: Verwende dies, wenn du das Passwort kennst - Ein "ZIP-Entsperrer online" ist nur dann das richtige Werkzeug, wenn du das Passwort bereits kennst.
  • ZIP-Groessen-Reduzierer - wann ZIP-Kompression Ihr Archiv tatsaechlich verkleinert - Eine leserorientierte Anleitung zur Verwendung eines ZIP-Groessen-Reduzierers: wann ZIP-Kompression tatsaechlich Platz spart, wann nicht, und wo der Browser-ZI...
  • ZIP-Kompression - ZIP-Kompressions-Anleitung - ZIP-Kompressions-Anleitung: wann ZIP Dateien verkleinert, wann nicht, und wie man einen Ordner online zu einem Archiv buendelt.
  • ZIP-Kompressor Online - wann er einen Ordner schrumpfen laesst und wann nicht - Ein Online-ZIP-Kompressor buendelt einen Ordner mit Dateien in eine .zip.
  • ZIP-Kompressor: Dateien in ein kleineres ZIP-Archiv komprimieren - Eine kurze leseraufgaben-orientierte Anleitung zur Verwendung eines ZIP-Kompressors: wann ZIP-Komprimierung fuer einen Ordner mit Dateien gewaehlt werden sollt...
  • ZIP-Passwort-Entsperrer: wann ein Online-Werkzeug ein Passwort entfernen kann (und wann es eines nicht knacken kann) - Was ZIP-Passwort-Entsperrer online bedeutet: ein Passwort entfernen, das Sie bereits kennen, aus einem .zip-Archiv; unbekannte Passwoerter koennen nicht geknac...
  • ZIP-Passwort-Wiederherstellung Online - was funktioniert (und was nicht) - ZIP-Passwort-Wiederherstellungs-Leitfaden online: was Online-Entsperrer koennen und nicht koennen, plus die drei funktionierenden Wege, wenn Sie ein ZIP-Passwo...
  • ZIP-Passworttypen - stark vs schwach, erklaert (wann ein Online-Entferner helfen kann) - Bevor Sie eine passwortgeschuetzte ZIP an https://freetoolonline.com/zip-tools/remove-zip-password.html hochladen, pruefen Sie den Verschluesselungstyp.
  • Zipar Pasta Online - Como Compactar uma Pasta em ZIP no Navegador - Como zipar uma pasta online no navegador.
  • Zipar Pasta Online Gratis - guia - Zipe uma pasta online gratis no navegador - arraste, escolha senha opcional, baixe o .zip.
  • Zipear Carpeta Online Gratis - guia - Zipea una carpeta online gratis en el navegador - arrastra, elige contrasena opcional, descarga el .zip.
